title: Restaurant business todos — quick errands + ghost kitchen
html:
TL;DR

  • Mid-April-2021 senior-year todo for the family restaurant: quick errands, social media, get on DoorDash, investigate ghost kitchen potential, consistent promotions, "website??" — followed by a small ingredients list (2 romaine 3-pack, 2 cabbage, carne).
  • First explicit ghost kitchen mention in vault — Yahir applying delivery economy thinking to the family taqueria three years before Bromenu would formalize the restaurant-tech instinct.
  • The mix of strategic items (ghost kitchen, website) with errands (cabbage, carne) is the form at its purest — Yahir doesn't separate operational from strategic; both go in the same note.
  • Continuous with the Nov 2020 scholarship essays note which also flagged "quarantine business for dad" — the dad business thread runs across all of Yahir's senior-year notes.
  • Foreshadows Bromenu's 2024 restaurant-menu-scraping work — the same orientation (treat the restaurant as a software-addressable surface) is here three years early, applied to his family's own restaurant first.

Note

A short note, two registers. Yahir at 18 listing what would actually move his family's restaurant forward — the DoorDash onboarding, the ghost kitchen possibility, the website-question-mark — and then the cabbage/carne grocery line that grounds it back in the kitchen reality. The "investigate potential ghost kitchen" line is the one that ages most: Yahir at 18 already aware of the delivery only restaurant model that would dominate the next half-decade. The "website??" with the double question mark reads as Yahir hesitating on what would later become his entire vocational orbit — software-as-leverage on physical businesses.

Connections

  • ghost kitchen — first vault mention
  • doordash · disruption
  • bromenu — restaurant-tech downstream
  • 2020 11 15 scholarship essays todo — "quarantine business for dad" companion line
  • debt of gratitude · yahir family

related.label: Scholarship essays — Nov 2020 senior-year hustle map
